name: WordPress Plugin Scaffolder
description: Scaffold a brand-new WordPress plugin from scratch using the WordPress Plugin Boilerplate pattern, enforcing security, i18n, coding standards, and a clean OOP architecture.
howToUse: Tell Claude or Cursor to use this skill, then provide your plugin name and a short description. Optionally specify author info, minimum WordPress/PHP versions, license, and whether the plugin needs admin or public-facing functionality. The skill will generate the full plugin folder structure with all boilerplate files ready to extend.
author: Ken Stark
